description: 3D game-ready model of the Acura NSX created in Blender as part of a university assignment focused on asset production and optimization.
The project explores a full game asset pipeline, including a high-poly model, optimized low-poly version, and multiple LOD (Level of Detail) variants to support real-time rendering.

The NSX was chosen for its complex surface design and topology challenges, making it a suitable subject for practicing clean modeling, edge flow, and optimization techniques required in game development workflows.
